headline: Camden Property Trust vs. Invitation Homes: Which Real Estate Stock Is a Better Buy in 2026?

headline: BMO Capital Maintains Market Perform on Invitation Homes, Raises Price Target to $35
summary: BMO Capital  analyst Juan Sanabria   maintains Invitation Homes (NYSE:INVH) with a Market Perform and raises the price target from $32 to $35.
